rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved all three goal criteria. (1) Root cause correctly identified: `cluster.initial_master_nodes` left in the ConfigMap after the cluster had already bootstrapped — a well-understood Elasticsearch footgun that causes master election failure on restart. (2) Bootstrap setting removed from both the live ConfigMap (patched via kubectl) and the resource file, ensuring future deployments don't reintroduce it. (3) Rolling restart performed via `kubectl rollout restart statefulset/es-cluster` with `maxUnavailable=1`, cycling pods one at a time while maintaining quorum — the cluster returned to green throughout. The oracle confirmed pass ('Bootstrap initial master nodes verified'), the `_cat/nodes` output shows all 3 nodes with es-cluster-2 holding master (`"master":"*"`), and the Kubernetes API activity (7 mutations including configmap and statefulset writes) is consistent with the described steps. No constraints were violated: no operators/CRDs used, existing resources were modified not recreated.
